# t4o_workload (Resource)

Manages a TrilioVault for OpenStack workload (protection plan).



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `instance_ids` (List of String) List of Nova instance UUIDs to include in this workload.
- `name` (String) Workload name.
- `workload_type_id` (String) Workload type UUID from `data.t4o_workload_types`. Changing forces recreation.

### Optional

- `backup_target_id` (String) UUID of the backup target.
- `description` (String) Optional description.
- `encryption` (Boolean) Encrypt this workload's backups (Barbican-backed). Requires `secret_uuid`. Set at creation — changing it forces recreation.
- `jobschedule` (Attributes) Inline backup schedule. If `enabled = true` without a cloud trust, a warning is emitted. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--jobschedule))
- `policy_id` (String) UUID of a workload policy. Mutually exclusive with inline `jobschedule`.
- `secret_uuid` (String) Barbican secret UUID holding the encryption passphrase (required when `encryption = true`). Create it with `openstack_keymanager_secret_v1`. Forces recreation if changed.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Workload UUID.

<a id="nestedatt--jobschedule"></a>
### Nested Schema for `jobschedule`

Required:

- `enabled` (Boolean) Enable automatic backup scheduling.

Optional:

- `end_date` (String) Schedule end date (ISO 8601).
- `fullbackup_interval` (Number) Full backup every N incremental runs.
- `interval` (String) Backup frequency, e.g. `daily`, `weekly`, `hours 12`.
- `retention_days` (Number) Retain snapshots for N days.
- `snapshots_to_retain` (Number) Number of snapshots to keep.
- `start_date` (String) Schedule start date (ISO 8601).
